name: Wilkerson Transportation

notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); listed Louisville location 3101 Commerce Center Pl 40211 is a multi-tenant industrial complex (other tenants include Rapid Windshields). name: A Class Limosenes
registry_source: Arkansas Secretary of State BCS (not located via public web search; SSL cert error on direct query)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). No SAFER record under 'A Class Limo*' for AR; only AR match is A CLASS LIMOUSINE USDOT 2714753 located Costa Mesa CA (not the AR entity). Listed name likely a misspelling of 'Limousines'. AR SOS BCS search portal returned no public listing in available channels. McCardell First Class Transportation (601 S First St, Jacksonville AR) appears at a different address. No corroborating online presence found at 2101 Graham Rd.

name: J & N Transit Corp
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records (search returned no matching records)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). No SAFER record under 'J & N TRANSIT' or 'J N TRANSIT' in WI; only J AND N TRANSIT LLC USDOT 3065310 located Delta AL. The listed address 11906 N Solar Ave, Mequon WI 53097 is a residential single-family home (4 bed/2.5 bath, ~3,254 sqft, last MLS 1222707/1536929) — suggests home-based or possibly defunct micro-operator. WI DFI Corporate Search returned 0 records. Mequon-Thiensville School District uses Go Riteway as primary contractor.

name: Annie's Transportation Inc
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records (search inconclusive via public URL form)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER 'ANNIE*' keyword scan returned no Milwaukee/WI carrier. Closest matches by name: ANNIE TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3751675) in Center Point AL; ANNIE'S TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3132003) in Creal Spring IL (status: Inactive since 2018). Annie's Angels Transportation (annieangels.com) operates from Lansing IL since 2021 — likely not the same entity. Listed address 4877 N Green Bay Ave Milwaukee WI 53209 appears on LoopNet as a commercial real estate listing (multi-tenant). Likely a small home/garage-based NEMT-type operator with no FMCSA registration.
